ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "osborne_no" TEXT /* Osborne number for the product */,
  "tube_size" INTEGER /* Size of the tube associated with the product */,
  "hole_diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the hole in inches */,
  "weight_oz" REAL /* Weight of the product in ounces */,
  "upc_no" TEXT /* Universal Product Code for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the product is made of */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the product information was updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time for receiving the product from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product associated with this inventory record */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity before a reorder is triggered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the product within the warehouse */,
  "date_last_stocked" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was stocked */,
  "last_stocked_by" TEXT /* User who last stocked the inventory */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the next reorder is planned */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "last_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the last reorder */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the next order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "credit_rating" TEXT /* Credit rating of the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Account manager at the supplier */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier from whom the product is ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, received) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "order_total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the order */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the order */,
  "date_approved" TEXT /* Date the order was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user for communication */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions the user has (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
